member.summary: Compares the current instance with another object of the same type.
member.param: An object to compare with this instance.
member.returns: A 32-bit signed integer that indicates the relative order of the objects being compared. The return value has these meanings: Value Meaning Less than zero This instance is less than obj. Zero This instance is equal to obj. Greater than zero This instance is greater than obj.
member.exception: obj is not the same type as this instance.

member.name: T:Abc.OnlinePublication.Common.ClonableObject
member.summary:
BaseObject class is an abstract class for you to derive from.
Every class that will be dirived from this class will support the Clone method automaticly.
The class implements the interface ICloneable and there for every object that will be derived
from this object will support the ICloneable interface as well.

member.summary: JpegPreview

member.summary: SaveAsIndesign

member.name: F:Abc.OnlinePublication.Common.JobType.JpegPreviewAndSave
member.summary: JpegPreview then SaveAsIndesign

member.name: F:Abc.OnlinePublication.Common.JobType.SaveAsIndesignToAltFolder
member.summary: Exactly like SaveAsIndesign, but save to diff location.
member.remarks: Because we dont want nobody to touch the .indd file untill the client approves the job or cancels the job, that's why we save the job in the CompletedJobs folder under DocumentsRoot forder. When client approves/cancels the job from CMyAbc we need to move the file from CompletedJobs to a Layout folder. But for cancelation we insert a queue in AOP database so it will generate a fresh .indd file. The problem is we are trying to move the file when it is being generated by AOP. So the enum will flag AOP to generate the file in the target folder, Layout folder, instead of CompletedJobs.
